mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_PRD_SALARY_LOG( ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, START_DATE, END_DATE, DEPT_ID, FLAG, ERR_MSG ) SELECT #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{startDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CLOB(#{errMsg}) FROM DUAL
